description_long: This helmet features a sleek, futuristic design with a smooth, contoured shell composed of interlocking polygonal panels. The exterior is predominantly a dark metallic gray with subtle variations in tone, giving it a high-tech, armored appearance. The surface is mostly smooth with a few shallow grooves and recessed areas, suggesting reinforced structural elements. There are no visible vents, visors, or external attachments, and the helmet appears fully enclosed, offering maximum coverage for the head. The sides display some sculpted lines and shallow indentations, adding to the aerodynamic look. The overall form is compact and rounded, suitable for urban use where protection and style are both priorities.
description: A sleek, fully enclosed helmet with a dark metallic finish and polygonal paneling, featuring a smooth, aerodynamic design with no visible vents or visor.
description_view_0: Front view shows the helmet's symmetrical, armored faceplate with polygonal panels and no visible openings or visor.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlights the helmet's contoured, aerodynamic profile and sculpted surface lines.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, rounded back with interlocking panels and no external features.
description_view_3: Left-side view mirrors the right, showing the same sculpted lines and seamless panel transitions.
